data.title: Economist warns of hyperinflation due to Trump's "Genius Act" and rise of stablecoins, changing global monetary system.
data.description: Economic expert Lynette Zang has issued a cautionary statement regarding the future of the U.S. dollar and global financial stability, citing concerns over the impact of President Donald Trump's "Genius Act" and the swift emergence of stablecoins. Zang warned that the adoption of stablecoins could lead to hyperinflation, following the signing of the Genius Act by Trump, which she believes has altered the international monetary landscape. In an interview with Kitco News, Zang expressed certainty that stablecoins will pave the way for hyperinflation, ultimately necessitating a transition into a new monetary system. With decades of experience studying monetary cycles, Zang highlighted that the shift has already begun, prompting her to express apprehension. She emphasized that there is a lack of awareness among Americans regarding these potential developments. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: LA Times gets closer to going public, plans $500M IPO in fall. Seeks to raise funds by selling private shares to investors.
data.description: The company, reportedly aiming for an initial public offering in the upcoming fall, revealed its intentions to raise a maximum of $500 million by selling private shares to potential investors.

data.title: Durov warns of need to protect free internet as EU pushes Chat Control; UK, Australia move towards digital IDs.
data.description: Members of the European Union parliament are advocating for the implementation of Chat Control, a measure aimed at monitoring online conversations. Meanwhile, both the United Kingdom and Australia are making progress towards establishing digital identification systems. Pavel Durov has cautioned against these initiatives, referring to them as "dystopian" and urging for their prevention.

data.title: Shoplazza concludes 2025 DTC Summit with AI innovations and record merchant participation, driving growth globally.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, in Toronto, the 2025 DTC Summit by Shoplazza, a leading global SaaS platform for direct-to-consumer commerce, was completed. This signifies a significant achievement in their goal to provide rapid, smart, and expansive solutions for merchants globally. The summit brought together a large number of attendees to discuss industry trends and strategies for business advancement.

data.title: Faraday Future delivers FF 91 2.0 to Pinnacle Real Estate Group President Calvin Gong in Bradbury, CA co-creation ceremony.
data.description: Calvin Gong, President of Pinnacle Real Estate Group, recently received his brand new FF 91 2.0 Futurist Alliance vehicle from Faraday Future. The delivery took place at a special co-creation event. This highly-anticipated moment marks an important milestone for Faraday Future as they continue to innovate and deliver cutting-edge vehicles to their customers. The FF 91 2.0 Futurist Alliance is equipped with advanced technology and features, showcasing the company's commitment to providing state-of-the-art electric vehicles. This event underscores Faraday Future's dedication to expanding their reach in the automotive industry and delivering exceptional products.

data.title: ACES India and BSNL join to provide 4G and 5G connectivity in Mumbai Metro Aqua Line-3, a major step in the state's telecom infrastructure vision.
data.description: In Mumbai, India, on October 10, 2025, ACES India, a subsidiary of ACES (Saudi Arabia), announced a strategic partnership with Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) to implement cutting-edge 4G and 5G In-Building Solutions (IBS) along the Mumbai Metro Aqua Line-3. This collaboration marks a significant achievement for the state's telecommunications sector.

data.title: Solana's transactions drop 50% from July peak ahead of ETF deadline, price may not see significant movement.
data.description: Despite the upcoming deadline for Solana's ETF approval, experts predict that the cryptocurrency's price may not experience significant movement. This is likely due to a notable decrease in transactions, which have dropped by 50% from their peak in July.
